name: shotcut-mcp
description: Create, edit, validate, preview, and render Shotcut projects through AI clients.
long_description: A local Model Context Protocol server for transactional editing of Shotcut MLT projects. Build multitrack timelines, apply effects and transitions, manage subtitles and markers, generate frame-accurate previews, and render finished media while preserving editable project output.

tools.name: shotcut_status
tools.description: Discover Shotcut, Melt, FFmpeg, and FFprobe and report versions.

tools.name: shotcut_doctor
tools.description: Verify Shotcut 26.6.25, MLT 7.40.x, repository startup, RNNoise, and path policy.

tools.name: shotcut_capabilities
tools.description: Return edit operations, render presets, compatibility, and workflow guidance.

tools.name: probe_media
tools.description: Inspect media streams, codecs, dimensions, frame rate, audio, and duration.

tools.name: inspect_project
tools.description: Inspect project revision, profile, tracks, items, effects, markers, subtitles, and resources.

tools.name: diagnose_color_workflow
tools.description: Report normalized media color facts and Shotcut 26.6 HDR compatibility.

tools.name: diagnose_missing_media
tools.description: Find bounded hash/basename relink candidates and optionally render a visual candidate sheet.

tools.name: plan_project_edit
tools.description: Validate operations and preview their snapshot and XML diff without changing the project.

tools.name: create_project
tools.description: Create a Shotcut-compatible multitrack MLT project.

tools.name: edit_project
tools.description: Apply up to 500 timeline operations in one validated transaction.

tools.name: list_mlt_services
tools.description: List locally available MLT filters, transitions, producers, consumers, or links.

tools.name: describe_mlt_service
tools.description: Return metadata for one installed MLT service.

tools.name: validate_project
tools.description: Parse a project and validate it with Melt.

tools.name: render_preview
tools.description: Render a selected project frame to PNG.

tools.name: render_preview_batch
tools.description: Render up to 64 exact project frames with per-output results.

tools.name: render_contact_sheet
tools.description: Render exact or evenly sampled frames into one atomic contact sheet.

tools.name: detect_hardware_encoders
tools.description: Smoke-test OS-appropriate FFmpeg hardware encoder candidates.

tools.name: open_in_shotcut
tools.description: Open a project or media path in the Shotcut GUI.

tools.name: start_render
tools.description: Start a monitored background render.

tools.name: render_status
tools.description: Return render state, progress, output information, and log tail.

tools.name: list_render_jobs
tools.description: List bounded newest-first durable render history.

tools.name: cancel_render
tools.description: Cancel a supervised render, including after the MCP server restarts.

tools.name: list_project_backups
tools.description: List retained project backups and revisions.

tools.name: restore_project_backup
tools.description: Validate and atomically restore a selected backup.
